# Reading Paths (First-Pass)

## Path A — Human newcomer (high-context, low-friction)
1. Root kernel: calls + fascia + peering + conjugation set.
2. `START-HERE-HUMAN.md`
3. `docs/README.md`
4. Relevant volume/codex branch by question domain.
5. `docs/maps/kernel-to-volumes.md` for trace continuity.

## Path B — Researcher (claims discipline first)
1. Root kernel files.
2. `KERNEL-INDEX.md`
3. `docs/maps/dependency-graph.md`
4. HC/SpiralOS specs and cited volumes.
5. Separate notes by: `canonical_claims`, `frontier_claims`, `fhs_claims`.

## Path C — Builder / implementer
1. Root kernel + `START-HERE-SI.md`
2. `docs/specs/` and schema layers (`docs/schemas/**`).
3. `docs/maps/dependency-graph.md`
4. Runtime planning in `runtime/` with provenance in `provenance/`.

## Path D — SI collaborator
1. `START-HERE-SI.md`
2. Root kernel files.
3. Interface/admissibility schemas (`docs/schemas/interfaces`, `docs/schemas/admissibility`).
4. Return outputs with lineage and refusal-safe fallbacks.
